ham.subject: Weekly Exclusive: Deals & Discounts Just For You!
ham.body:
Hello Valued Customer,

It’s that time of the month again! We’re excited to bring you the latest deals from XYZ that will make your shopping experience even better.

Highlights for this week:
- 25% off on all electronics
- Buy 1 Get 1 Free on selected fashion items
- Free shipping on orders above ₹999

Hurry, offers valid till Sunday 11:59 PM. Click the link below to explore:

<URL>

Thank you for choosing XYZ. Happy Shopping!

Best regards,
XYZ Marketing Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required for Your IT Ticket #987654
spam.body:
Dear User,

We have detected an issue with your system that requires immediate attention. According to our IT ticketing system, ticket #987654 has been flagged for a critical security update. If this issue is not resolved within 24 hours, your access to the company network may be restricted.

Please log in to the internal portal and submit the required verification details by clicking the link below:

<URL>

Thank you for your prompt cooperation.

Regards,
IT Helpdesk Team
